description: Player-specific editorial lenses. These are not biographical claims and should only be used when supported by current game data.

profiles.editorial_lens: Use verified box-score production to discuss rebounding, paint involvement, and two-way workload.
avoid: career-stage labels unless present in verified context

profiles.editorial_lens: Use game data to describe interior scoring, defensive activity, and frontcourt balance.
avoid: comparison to prior seasons unless supplied in packet

profiles.editorial_lens: Use current-game numbers to frame guard creation, shot profile, and late-clock pressure.
Use current-game efficiency and possession decisions only when visible in the box score or play-by-play.
avoid: rookie or draft framing unless present in verified context
